title: Best Asuka Figure Ever
wikitext:
[]: Best Asuka Figure Ever!             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Nov 04, 2007 12:19 pm This is the most amazing Eva-related figure of all time. Scroll down the page a bit. It is the second image, not the first. Enjoy! click here

[]: Re: Best Asuka Figure Ever!             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Nov 04, 2007 12:37 pm BrikHaus wrote: This is the most amazing Eva-related figure of all time. Scroll down the page a bit. It is the second image, not the first. Enjoy! click here

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 04, 2007 12:37 pm ....its was Asuka....on the crapper?

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:08 pm O for the love of Sadamoto...

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:19 pm WHAT THE HELL

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:19 pm ...What's the point? I seem to recall something like this being under discussion back when I first joined EMF. Truly, circumstances are cyclical.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:20 pm That's absurd! Is that official? I can't believe that actually exists. Whoever buys one of those statues is very obviously not playing with the full deck.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Nov 04, 2007 1:31 pm CitizenGeek wrote: That's absurd! Is that official? I can't believe that actually exists. Whoever buys one of those statues is very obviously not playing with the full deck.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Nov 04, 2007 2:46 pm Oh...my...god... That is bloody disgusting. And I thought I'd lost my marbles. Seriously, who the flying fuck's idea was this?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Nov 04, 2007 2:51 pm chee wrote: CitizenGeek wrote: That's absurd! Is that official? I can't believe that actually exists. Whoever buys one of those statues is very obviously not playing with the full deck.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Nov 04, 2007 2:53 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: Oh...my...god... That is bloody disgusting. And I thought I'd lost my marbles. Seriously, who the flying fuck's idea was this?

[]:             Quote Post by Squiggy » Sun Nov 04, 2007 2:59 pm lol Japan

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Nov 04, 2007 3:20 pm Shin-seiki wrote: There is no perversion that is so weird and/or disgusting that the Japanese won't cater to it. True fact.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 04, 2007 3:58 pm CitizenGeek wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: There is no perversion that is so weird and/or disgusting that the Japanese won't cater to it. True fact.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Nov 04, 2007 4:06 pm So...they modify models for the hell of comedy or fanservice? Well I'll say one thing...that wasn't funny :?

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Sun Nov 04, 2007 4:21 pm Hee heh, I lol'd. But then again I've seen worse toys exploring the scat fetish. I think there was one of Rei...doing her business "projectile" style. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 04, 2007 4:22 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: So...they modify models for the hell of comedy or fanservice?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Nov 04, 2007 4:24 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: So...they modify models for the hell of comedy or fanservice?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Nov 04, 2007 7:31 pm Tonight, on Fox: WHEN FETISHES COLLIDE!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Nov 04, 2007 8:39 pm :shock: :shock:
